title: OrgFlow: Generative Modeling of Organic Crystal Structures from Molecular Graphs
summary: Crystal structure prediction is a long-standing challenge in materials science, with most data-driven methods developed for inorganic systems. This leaves an important gap for organic crystals, which are central to pharmaceuticals, polymers, and functional materials, but present unique challenges, such as larger unit cells and strict chemical connectivity. We introduce a flow-matching model for predicting organic crystal structures directly from molecular graphs. The architecture integrates molecular connectivity with periodic boundary conditions while preserving the symmetries of crystalline systems. A bond-aware loss guides the model toward realistic local chemistry by enforcing distributions of bond lengths and connectivity. To support reliable and efficient training, we built a curated dataset of organic crystals, along with a preprocessing pipeline that precomputes bonds and edges, substantially reducing computational overhead during both training and inference. Experiments show that our method achieves a Match Rate more than 10 times higher than existing baselines while requiring fewer sampling steps for inference. These results establish generative modeling as a practical and scalable framework for organic crystal structure prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于流匹配的有机晶体结构预测模型，直接从分子图生成晶体结构，性能比现有基线提升10倍以上
AI.motivation: 有机晶体在制药、聚合物和功能材料中至关重要，但现有数据驱动方法主要针对无机系统，有机晶体预测面临更大晶胞和严格化学连接性等独特挑战
AI.method: 采用流匹配模型，将分子连接性与周期性边界条件集成，保持晶体系统对称性；使用键感知损失函数通过强制键长和连接性分布来引导模型实现真实的局部化学；构建了有机晶体数据集和预处理管道
AI.result: 方法实现了比现有基线高10倍以上的匹配率，同时需要更少的采样步骤进行推理
AI.conclusion: 生成建模为有机晶体结构预测提供了一个实用且可扩展的框架

title: Demonstration of High-Performance Ultra-Wide Bandgap SrSnO$_3$ Top-Gated MOSFETs
summary: We report the demonstration of high-performance top-gated metal-oxide-semiconductor field-effect transistors (MOSFETs) based on the ultra-wide bandgap perovskite oxide SrSnO$_3$ (SSO). Using hybrid molecular beam epitaxy-grown SSO channels and ALD-deposited HfO$_2$ gate dielectrics, the devices exhibit field-effect mobility exceeding 65 cm$^2$/V$\cdot$s, an on-state current up to 194 mA/mm, an on/off current ratio above $10^8$, and a contact resistance of 0.66 $Ω\cdot$mm. The devices also show a near-ideal subthreshold slope of 68 mV/dec and negligible hysteresis, indicating a high-quality dielectric/semiconductor interface. These results establish SrSnO$_3$ as a promising ultra-wide bandgap oxide semiconductor platform for high-performance power electronic applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了基于超宽带隙钙钛矿氧化物SrSnO₃的高性能顶栅MOSFET，具有超过65 cm²/V·s的场效应迁移率、194 mA/mm的导通电流、10⁸以上的开关比和0.66 Ω·mm的接触电阻。
AI.motivation: 开发基于超宽带隙氧化物半导体的高性能功率电子器件，SrSnO₃作为一种有前景的超宽带隙钙钛矿氧化物平台，具有应用于高性能功率电子器件的潜力。
AI.method: 采用混合分子束外延生长SrSnO₃沟道层，结合原子层沉积HfO₂栅介质，制备顶栅MOSFET结构。
AI.result: 器件表现出优异的电学性能：场效应迁移率超过65 cm²/V·s，导通电流达194 mA/mm，开关比超过10⁸，接触电阻为0.66 Ω·mm，亚阈值摆幅接近理想值68 mV/dec，且迟滞效应可忽略。
AI.conclusion: SrSnO₃被确立为一种有前景的超宽带隙氧化物半导体平台，适用于高性能功率电子应用，高质量的介电/半导体界面是实现优异性能的关键。

title: Self-driving thin film laboratory: autonomous epitaxial atomic-layer synthesis via real-time computer vision analysis of electron diffraction
summary: Emerging materials science platforms with the ability to make autonomous decisions on the fly are fundamentally changing the outlook and protocols for materials optimization and discovery. Because AI-driven self-navigating schemes can effectively reduce the total number of iterations needed to arrive at the "answer" (i.e. the best stochiometric composition for a desired physical property, optimum materials processing parameters, etc.) by significant margins, they have the potential to revolutionize materials and chemical manufacturing processes at large in research laboratory settings as well as in industrial plants. Here, we demonstrate a successful implementation of real-time closed-loop autonomous navigation of a multi-dimensional materials synthesis parameter space for fabricating phase-pure epitaxial films of a metastable phase of a functional oxide in a combinatorial pulsed laser deposition chamber. Sequential epitaxial growth iterations in search of the optimized recipe to stabilize the desired crystal phase were performed using frame-by-frame quantitative computer vision analysis of reflection high-energy electron diffraction (RHEED) images of the unit-cell level film being deposited. The autonomous scheme regularly resulted in > 30-fold reduction in the number of required experiments compared to a comprehensive mapping of the parameter space. The real-time workflow developed here can be readily extended to a variety of thin film synthesis platforms opening the door for self-driving atomic-level materials design as well as autonomous optimization of semiconductor manufacturing.

AI.tldr: AI自主导航系统在材料合成中实现实时闭环优化，将实验次数减少30倍以上
AI.motivation: 传统材料优化方法需要大量实验迭代，AI驱动的自主导航系统能显著减少所需实验次数，有望革新材料和化学制造过程
AI.method: 在组合脉冲激光沉积室中，通过计算机视觉实时分析RHEED图像，自主导航多维材料合成参数空间，优化亚稳态功能氧化物外延薄膜的生长条件
AI.result: 成功实现了相纯外延薄膜的自主合成，相比传统参数空间全面映射方法，实验次数减少了30倍以上
AI.conclusion: 开发的实时工作流程可扩展到各种薄膜合成平台，为实现自驱动原子级材料设计和半导体制造自主优化打开了大门

title: Propagation of elastic waves in a flexomagnetic solid
summary: Flexomagnetism is the coupling between magnetism and strain gradients and is a technologically relevant phenomenon. We present a theory of elastic wave propagation in a linear elastic flexomagnetic material with microstructure and strain gradient elastic interactions. The expressions of frequency, phase velocity, and group velocity of longitudinal and transverse waves are derived and are shown to depend on the flexomagnetic coefficient and microstructure. We also show that the effect of flexomagnetism and microstructure can lead to some interesting phenomena in wave propagation, which are not observed in classical linear elasticity theory of waves. Specifically, in contrast to classical linear elastic materials, where wave propagation is non-dispersive, flexomagnetic materials with microstructure can exhibit both normal and abnormal dispersion. It is also noteworthy that, in flexomagnetic materials with gradient elasticity, the phase velocities of transverse waves can exceed those of longitudinal waves, which is atypical in classical elasticity. Furthermore, waves can also attenuate for a certain range of wavenumbers that depend on the flexomagnetic coefficient and microstructural parameters. Finally, we explore the possibility of waves exhibiting zero group velocity modes, where waves are non-propagating but have strong local energy confinement, negative group velocity modes, where the wave packet moves in the opposite direction to that of wave propagation, and the phenomenon of wave freezing, where a propagating wave stops in space without diffusing or spreading.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了考虑微结构和应变梯度相互作用的线性弹性挠曲磁性材料中弹性波传播的理论，揭示了挠曲磁性和微结构导致的反常波传播现象。
AI.motivation: 研究挠曲磁性（磁性与应变梯度耦合）材料中弹性波传播的特性，探索微结构和应变梯度弹性相互作用对波传播行为的影响，这些现象在经典线性弹性理论中无法观察到。
AI.method: 建立了具有微结构和应变梯度弹性相互作用的线性弹性挠曲磁性材料的理论框架，推导了纵向波和横向波的频率、相速度和群速度表达式，分析了波传播特性与挠曲磁系数和微结构参数的关系。
AI.result: 发现挠曲磁性材料中的波传播表现出多种反常现象：1）出现正常和反常色散（经典材料中波传播无色散）；2）横向波相速度可能超过纵向波相速度；3）特定波数范围内波会衰减；4）存在零群速度模式、负群速度模式和波冻结现象。
AI.conclusion: 挠曲磁性和微结构显著改变了弹性波在材料中的传播特性，导致了多种经典弹性理论无法解释的反常现象，这些发现对理解挠曲磁性材料的波传播行为具有重要意义，并可能为新型波控制器件设计提供理论基础。

title: Environment-Induced Exciton Renormalization in the Photosystem II Reaction Center
summary: Protein electrostatics tune excitation energies in the Photosystem II reaction center (PSII-RC), yet a fully quantum-mechanical many-body description of how the surrounding protein environment renormalizes excitons has remained computationally inaccessible. The Bethe-Salpeter equation (BSE) within many-body perturbation theory accurately describes excitonic physics through an explicit electron-hole interaction, but is prohibitively expensive for systems containing thousands of valence electrons. Here, we show that for sufficiently large systems the BSE becomes simpler to solve when treated with modern stochastic sampling techniques, as atomistic interactions self-average. In this regime, the effective electron-hole interaction mediated by the environment is governed by collective $k$-dependent polarization. These insights enable an ab initio study of the PSII-RC in which all six chlorins forming the hexameric dye core are treated explicitly together with a roughly seven Angstrom local protein environment. We directly compare the low-lying optical excitations of the isolated chromophore hexamer (1276 valence electrons) and the protein-dye cluster (3238 valence electrons). For $Q_y$ excitations near 680 nm, inclusion of the protein environment induces polarization-dependent energy shifts, redistributes spectral weight, and alters exciton delocalization and pigment character. Lateral and transverse asymmetries in the low-lying excited states are captured at the BSE level of theory. These results establish that we now have the tools for many-body calculations of biological nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了基于随机采样技术的Bethe-Salpeter方程计算方法，成功应用于包含3238个价电子的光系统II反应中心蛋白-染料复合物的从头算研究。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质静电环境调节光系统II反应中心的激发能，但传统的量子力学多体方法无法处理包含数千个价电子的大型生物系统。
AI.method: 采用现代随机采样技术处理Bethe-Salpeter方程，利用原子相互作用的自平均效应，通过k依赖的集体极化描述环境介导的有效电子-空穴相互作用。
AI.result: 成功计算了包含6个叶绿素核心和约7Å局部蛋白质环境的光系统II反应中心，发现蛋白质环境引起极化依赖的能量位移、光谱权重重新分布，并改变激子离域和色素特性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了适用于生物纳米结构的多体计算方法，为理解蛋白质环境如何调节光合作用中的激发能提供了新工具。

title: Casimir-Polder energy landscape: Unipolarizable atom and ring
summary: The Casimir-Polder interaction energy between a unipolarizable point atom and a unipolarizable dielectric ring has been limited, until now, to the case when the atom is confined on the axis of symmetry of the ring. We find the generalized analytical expression for any position of the atom relative to the ring in terms of complete elliptic integrals. This is aided by the construction of a class of integrals of a Jacobian elliptic function as a linear combination of complete elliptic integrals. Our expression for the interaction energy allows us to investigate the instability of the atom even for the equilibrium points which exists off the axis of symmetry.

AI.tldr: 推导了单极化点原子与单极化介质环之间卡西米尔-波尔德相互作用的广义解析表达式，适用于原子在环对称轴外的任意位置。
AI.motivation: 之前的研究仅限于原子位于环对称轴上的情况，需要扩展到原子在任意位置的一般情况，以研究对称轴外平衡点的不稳定性。
AI.method: 通过构造雅可比椭圆函数积分类作为完全椭圆积分的线性组合，推导出适用于任意原子位置的广义解析表达式。
AI.result: 获得了用完全椭圆积分表示的广义解析表达式，能够研究原子在对称轴外平衡点的不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 成功扩展了卡西米尔-波尔德相互作用的分析范围，为研究原子在介质环任意位置的行为提供了数学工具。

title: Qubit Noise Spectroscopy of Superconducting Dynamics in a Magnetic Field
summary: An applied magnetic field affects a superconductor in two ways -- by promoting pairing fluctuations, and by inducing topological defects called vortices that carry quantized magnetic flux. A quantitative characterization of the resultant field-induced superconducting dynamics with spatio-temporal resolution remains challenging, particularly in two-dimensional materials. In this work, we analyze magnetic noise measured by the depolarization rate of a proximate single spin-qubit as a non-invasive probe of such dynamical fluctuations. We demonstrate that the temperature dependence of the magnetic noise spectrum near $T_c$ deviates from predictions based on quasiparticle excitations due to critical superconducting fluctuations, which in turn are enhanced by a weak applied field. By analyzing the magnetic noise due to vortex dynamics, we further show that noise spectroscopy is not only able to distinguish between different vortex phases, but also extract key physical quantities of interest, such as oscillation frequencies of pinned vortices, phonon dispersion of vortex lattices and vortex diffusivity in a vortex liquid. Complementing recent work on noise magnetometry of quasiparticle excitations and Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless transitions in two-dimensional superconductors without an applied field, our work highlights the ability of noise spectroscopy to reveal a wealth of superconducting dynamical phenomena in an applied field.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用单自旋量子比特的退极化率测量磁噪声，揭示了外加磁场下二维超导体中配对涨落和涡旋动力学的丰富动态现象。
AI.motivation: 磁场对超导体产生两种影响：促进配对涨落和诱导携带量子化磁通的拓扑缺陷（涡旋）。在二维材料中，对磁场诱导的超导动力学进行定量表征具有挑战性，特别是在时空分辨率方面。
AI.method: 使用邻近单自旋量子比特的退极化率测量磁噪声作为非侵入式探针，分析磁场诱导的超导动态涨落。通过磁噪声谱的温度依赖性分析临界超导涨落和涡旋动力学。
AI.result: 发现Tc附近磁噪声谱的温度依赖性偏离基于准粒子激发的预测，这是由于临界超导涨落被弱磁场增强所致。噪声谱分析能够区分不同涡旋相，并提取关键物理量：钉扎涡旋的振荡频率、涡旋晶格的声子色散以及涡旋液体中的涡旋扩散率。
AI.conclusion: 噪声谱技术能够揭示外加磁场下丰富的超导动态现象，补充了无磁场情况下二维超导体中准粒子激发和BKT转变的噪声磁测量研究，展示了该技术在超导动力学研究中的强大能力。

title: A Novel NPT Thermodynamic Integration Scheme to Derive Rigorous Gibbs Free Energies for Crystalline Solids
summary: Thermodynamic Integration (TI) is the state-of-the-art computational technique for accurate Gibbs free energy predictions of solids. Conventional TI schemes start from an NVT harmonic reference and require three successive corrections to recover the Gibbs free energy of the real crystal in the NPT ensemble. However, the NVT-to-NPT correction neglects full cell flexibility. Here, we present a rigorous (and only) two-step TI scheme that operates entirely in the NPT ensemble, eliminating the need for the approximate NVT-to-NPT step. The key methodological advancement is the novel NPT reference that explicitly accounts for full cell fluctuations. The new approach is compared with the conventional one via two complementary case studies. For ice polymorphs, having simple cell-shape distributions, the new approach reproduces conventional TI results with excellent agreement. For CsPbI3, whose black phase exhibits complex cell-shape behavior, we demonstrate that our novel method provides more accurate Gibbs free energy differences than the conventional one. Moreover, the proposed framework maintains comparable computational cost while offering a simplified workflow. Overall, the new NPT TI scheme provides rigorous and direct Gibbs free energy calculations for solids.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的两步法NPT热力学积分方案，消除了传统方法中需要近似NVT-to-NPT校正的步骤，通过引入考虑完整晶胞涨落的NPT参考态，实现了更精确的固体吉布斯自由能计算。
AI.motivation: 传统热力学积分方案从NVT谐振子参考态出发，需要三个连续校正才能得到真实晶体在NPT系综中的吉布斯自由能，但其中的NVT-to-NPT校正忽略了完整的晶胞柔性。需要一种更严谨、更直接的计算方法。
AI.method: 开发了一种全新的两步法热力学积分方案，完全在NPT系综中操作。关键方法学进展是引入了新颖的NPT参考态，该参考态明确考虑了完整的晶胞涨落。通过两个互补的案例研究（冰多晶型和CsPbI3）与传统方法进行比较。
AI.result: 对于具有简单晶胞形状分布的冰多晶型，新方法与传统热力学积分结果高度一致。对于具有复杂晶胞形状行为的CsPbI3黑色相，新方法提供了比传统方法更精确的吉布斯自由能差异。同时保持了可比较的计算成本并简化了工作流程。
AI.conclusion: 新的NPT热力学积分方案为固体提供了严谨且直接的吉布斯自由能计算方法，消除了传统方法中的近似步骤，特别适用于具有复杂晶胞行为的材料系统。

title: Spectral Decimation of Quantum Many-Body Hamiltonians
summary: We develop a systematic theory of spectral decimation for quantum many-body Hamiltonians and show that it provides a quantitative probe of emergent symmetries in statistically mixed spectra. Building on an analytical description of statistical mixtures, we derive an explicit expression for the size of a characteristic symmetry sector (CSS), defined as the largest subsequence of levels exhibiting non-Poissonian correlations. The CSS dimension is shown to be the size-biased average of the underlying symmetry sectors, establishing a direct link between spectral statistics and Hilbert-space structure. We apply this framework to two paradigmatic settings: Hilbert-space fragmentation and disorder-induced many-body localization (MBL). In fragmented systems, the CSS reproduces the mixture prediction and isolates correlated subsectors even when the full spectrum appears nearly Poissonian. In the disordered Heisenberg chain, spectral decimation reveals the gradual emergence of integrability through a shrinking CSS, whose statistics exhibit signatures consistent with local integrals of motion. We introduce a characteristic symmetry entropy (CSE) as a finite-size scaling observable and extract, within accessible system sizes, the crossover exponents. Our results establish spectral decimation as a controlled, unbiased and computationally inexpensive diagnostic of hidden structure in many-body spectra, capable of distinguishing between chaotic dynamics, statistical mixtures, and emergent integrability.

AI.tldr: 提出光谱减缩理论作为量子多体哈密顿量的系统性诊断工具，通过识别特征对称性扇区来探测统计混合谱中的涌现对称性。
AI.motivation: 需要一种可控、无偏且计算成本低的诊断工具来揭示多体谱中的隐藏结构，区分混沌动力学、统计混合和涌现可积性。
AI.method: 建立光谱减缩的系统性理论，定义特征对称性扇区(CSS)作为展现非泊松关联的最大能级子序列，推导CSS维度的显式表达式，并引入特征对称性熵(CSE)作为有限尺寸标度可观测量。
AI.result: 在希尔伯特空间碎片化和无序诱导的多体局域化系统中，光谱减缩能有效识别相关子扇区，CSS维度被证明是底层对称性扇区的尺寸偏倚平均值，建立了谱统计与希尔伯特空间结构的直接联系。
AI.conclusion: 光谱减缩理论为多体谱中的隐藏结构提供了强有力的诊断工具，能够区分混沌、统计混合和涌现可积性，并可在可访问系统尺寸内提取交叉指数。
